/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libhypercycle_pqc.so -o libhypercycle_pqc.so CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/hc_gpu_universal.c.o CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/hc_vacuum_engine.c.o CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/vortex_integration.c.o CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/vortex_pqc_api.c.o CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/hc_ed25519.c.o CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/ed25519/ed25519_api.c.o CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/ed25519/ed25519_core.c.o CMakeFiles/hypercycle_pqc.dir/src/ed25519/ed25519_field.c.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -ldl -lm -lpthread
